title: Cisco Firewall Management Software Vulnerabilities
summary: Two max-severity defects in Cisco's firewall management software allow an attacker to access unauthorized data. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: Cisco reveals 2 max-severity defects in firewall management software

title: CVE-2026-27750: Avira Internet Security Optimizer TOCTOU Vulnerability
summary: A TOCTOU vulnerability in the Optimizer component of Avira Internet Security allows a privileged service to access unauthorized data. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots

title: CVE-2026-27749: Avira Internet Security System Speedup Deserialization Vulnerability
summary: A deserialization vulnerability in the System Speedup component of Avira Internet Security allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots

title: CVE-2026-2599: PHP Object Injection in WordPress Contact Form Plugins
summary: A PHP object injection vulnerability in WordPress contact form plugins allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: Google says 90 zero-days exploited in attacks last year

title: CVE-2026-30791: Broken Cryptographic Algorithm in RustDesk Client
summary: A use of a broken or risky cryptographic algorithm vulnerability in RustDesk Client allows an attacker to access unauthorized data. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: Google says 90 zero-days exploited in 2025 as commercial vendor activity grows

title: CVE-2026-3598: Broken Cryptographic Algorithm in RustDesk Server Pro
summary: A use of a broken or risky cryptographic algorithm vulnerability in RustDesk Server Pro allows an attacker to access unauthorized data. Patch status: unknown, urgency: high.

primary.title: Google says 90 zero-days exploited in 2025 as commercial vendor activity grows
